source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from official BMW USA pricing and finance pages

finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: BMWUSA.com lists a starting MSRP of $57,900 before destination, taxes, title, registration, dealer fees, and optional equipment.
finance_snapshot.apr: BMW financing and lease programs vary by model, ZIP code, term, and approved credit; check BMW special offers for current regional programs.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use BMW?s car payment estimator or a BMW Center quote for current monthly payment estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by lender approval, taxes, fees, incentives, and buyer structure.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Lease estimates vary by region, trim, mileage allowance, and current BMW Financial Services programs.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by taxes, fees, first payment, incentives, and retailer structure.
finance_snapshot.incentives: BMW publishes regional lease and financing offers that can change frequently and should be confirmed with a local BMW Center.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See BMW value and ownership resources for current warranty, maintenance, and roadside-assistance details.
finance_snapshot.best_for: EV shoppers who want a premium badge and sedan-like shape instead of a crossover.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Combines BMW brand recognition with a clearly defined electric-vehicle identity.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Charging setup, insurance, and EV depreciation trends can weigh heavily on the ownership equation.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses BMW USA model pricing and BMW Financial Services pages on March 26, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Canonical image refreshed on March 28, 2026 from a user-provided replacement image.
